ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the energy data */,
  "aep_mw" REAL /* Energy consumption in megawatts (MW) at the given timestamp */,
  "new_date" TEXT /* Date of the energy data */,
  "new_time" TEXT /* Time of the energy data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the energy data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (power plant, substation, or consumer meter) */,
  "voltage_level" REAL /* Voltage level at the given timestamp */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency at the given timestamp */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding forecast data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES energy_forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the power plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the power plant */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Capacity of the power plant in megawatts (MW) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the power plant (e.g., coal, nuclear, solar) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the power plant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who manages the power plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_plants_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substations" (
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substation */,
  "substation_name" TEXT /* Name of the substation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the substation */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Capacity of the substation in megawatts (MW) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the substation (e.g., transmission, distribution) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the substation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who manages the substation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer meter */,
  "meter_name" TEXT /* Name of the consumer meter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the consumer meter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the consumer meter (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the consumer meter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_reading_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reading */,
  "next_reading_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled reading */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy, cloudy) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy forecast record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_mw" REAL /* Forecasted energy demand in megawatts (MW) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for prediction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., grid operator, energy analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., power plant, substation, consumer meter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being logged */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid operation */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of the operation (e.g., maintenance, upgrade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., completed, in progress, scheduled) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_operations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_operations_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
